title: tecoma cochabambensis
intro: Tecoma cochabambensis, also known as the Cochabamba trumpet vine or Yellow Trumpetbush, is a flowering plant species native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tecoma cochabambensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
